## Checklist

<!-- Check each box that applies with an [x] -->

- [ ] Tests added or updated for the change
- [ ] Documentation updated (README, CONNECTOR_GUIDE, inline comments) if needed
- [ ] Commit messages follow Conventional Commits format
- [ ] `lefthook` hooks pass locally (`pre-commit` and `commit-msg`)
- [ ] No breaking changes introduced, **or** breaking changes are described below

### For connector PRs only

- [ ] Connector tested against a real instance of the service
- [ ] Config fields documented in the connector's source
